user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look at the [documentation]({documentation_url}).

error.invalid_auth: The API key is invalid or missing the required ha:read scope.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Daynest host.
error.unsupported_contract: The Daynest server contract version is not supported by this integration.

data_description.update_interval_hours: How often to refresh data from the API (0.25 to 24 hours)
data_description.enable_debugging: Enable detailed debug logging for troubleshooting
data_description.custom_icon: Override the default icon for entities (optional)

update_failed.message: Failed to update data from the server.

switch_turn_on_failed.message: Failed to turn on the switch.

switch_turn_off_failed.message: Failed to turn off the switch.

number_set_failed.message: Failed to set the target value.

init.title: Update API Endpoint
init.description:
Your device is using API version {api_version} which is deprecated. Please update to v2 for continued support and new features.

Click Submit to update your device to use the new API endpoint (v2). This will reload the integration.

init.title: Acknowledge Configuration Issue
init.description:
Some configuration options are missing or invalid. Please reconfigure the integration to ensure proper operation.

Click Submit to acknowledge this issue. You may need to reconfigure the integration if problems persist.
